flavorTextEN: This pain... I shall take on all of it.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, COST  [[Rest] this unit], look at the top card of your deck, and you may call it to (RC) if it is a unit card. At the end of that turn, retire that called unit. (Put it on the top of the deck if you did not call)

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Blaster Dark", reveal the top card of your deck, call it to (RC) as [Rest] if it is a unit card, and discard it if it isn't.
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: There are things that the light cannot accomplish. And they know of this.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress" or "Pentagleam Sorceress", COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard a card from your hand], look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose up to two unit cards from among them, call them to (RC), and put the rest on the top of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: Just a little is fine. Give me the power to see into the future!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your drive check reveals a trigger unit, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: The cheerful Sister is beloved by even the people of the land.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1) & [Rest] this unit], look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose a card from among them, put it on the top of your deck, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: Its sense to isolate targets stands out even among the Sisters.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Knight of Heavenly Spear, Rooks", COST  [reveal two grade 3 cards from your hand], reveal the top card of your deck, call it to (RC) if it is a unit card, and put it into your drop if it isn't.
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your grade 3 vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: "Cloud Knights" protect the law and order of the land from the skies.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and until end of turn, the [Power] increase of the trigger effects revealed by your drive check gets +5000.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

Light will always be accompanied by shadows. That is the unwavering truth.

flavorTextEN: One by one, build it up without rushing.

flavorTextEN: I'll be pleasured to give you anything you want.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Soul Blast (2)], and until end of turn, the [Power] increase of the trigger effects revealed by your drive check gets +5000.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit is placed on (RC), choose up to one [Critical] trigger or [Front] trigger from your hand, reveal it and put it on the bottom of your deck. If you put it, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, COST  [discard a card from your hand], look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose up to two unit cards from among them, call them to (RC) as [Rest], and discard the rest.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1) & reveal three grade 3 from your hand], choose a grade 3 card from your drop, and put it on the top of your deck.
flavorTextEN: Give up on hoping that it'll miss!

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [[Rest] this unit], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

flavorTextEN: It will definitely go well. The girl knows that.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):All of your grade 3 units get [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: I'll slow their progress, even if it is just a little bit......!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit is placed on (RC), choose up to one [Critical] trigger or [Front] trigger from your hand, reveal it and put it on the bottom of your deck. If you put a card, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Good and bad fortune, you must possess the skill to see through both.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [discard a "Hexaorb Sorceress" from your hand], choose a Hexaorb Sorceress on your (VC) or (RC), and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: If there is a deity of discarding, then there should be a deity of picking up, too.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards in the same column as this unit, and put that unit and this unit on the bottom of each player's decks.
flavorTextEN: Throughout time, fire has always been the most reliable wat to sterilize and disinfect.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [discard a "Hexaorb Sorceress" from your hand], choose a Hexaorb Sorceress on your (VC) or (RC), and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: If there is a deity of discarding, then there should be a deity of picking up, too.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if you have a vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name, COST  [discard a card from your hand], look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose up to two unit cards from among them, call them to (RC) as [Rest], and discard the rest.
flavorTextEN: Faster, and more vivid than anyone else. Heading towards the bloodied battlefield.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle your drive check revealed a trigger unit, if your vanguard is "Hexaorb Sorceress", COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your other rear-guards, [Stand] it, and retire this unit.
flavorTextEN: You're in luck today! Have another go!

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row RC):When your other unit in the same column as this unit [Stand] by a card's effect, you may return this unit to your hand.

effectEN: [CONT][RC]:If there are no other units in the same column as this unit, this unit gets [Power]+10000. (Including your opponent's rear-guards)
flavorTextEN: There's no one around - such a pleasant feeling.

effectEN: [CONT](RC/Trigger Zone):If your vanguard is "Apex-surpassing Sword, Bastion Prime", this card gets grade +2/[Power]+5000. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN: One with the aptitude to become a great talent. This is that omen.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is revealed for your drive check, if you have a vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name, COST  [put this card into your drop], and your opponent puts all of their front row rear-guards on the bottom of their deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: Enemy sighted in the 9 o'clock direction, let's shoot them down.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit is [Stand] by your vanguard's ability, you may Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Advance! Oh prideful knights! The flag of our land is here!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn for each of your other units.
flavorTextEN: Stay healthy, everyone! Knowing that you're all healthy gives me power!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle when your drive check reveals a trigger unit, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard two cards from your hand], and draw two cards.
flavorTextEN: You "saw it" as well, right? That's what it means, after all.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC) by the ability of your vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name during your turn, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit boosted "Knight of Loyalty, Bedivere", this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: No matter what hardships fell upon us, our friendship was never lost.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Harsh Training, Thegrea", reveal the top card of your deck, and if it is a grade 2 or less unit card, you may call it to (RC) as [Rest]. (Return it to its original spot if you do not call)
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: What a pleasant morning. Perfect for training.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) other than by the effect of "Orgulous Lion", if you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], search deck for up to one card with the same card name as this card, call to (RC) as [Rest], and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Realizing its duty, this lion offers its fangs to fate.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by a grade 2 with "Blaster" in its card name, look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one grade 2 with "Blaster" in its card name from among them, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck. If you did not reveal a card, choose a "Wingal Brave" from your soul, and you may call it to (RC).
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have three or more units, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: The wisdom of a sage has guided heroes to victory many times.

effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If your soul has two or more grade 2 cards with "Blaster" in their different card names , this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts grade 3 or greater unit, if you have a vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row RC):When your other unit in the same column as this unit [Stand] by a card's effect, you may return this unit to your hand.
flavorTextEN: Now then, who should I heal next?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC) by the ability of your vanguard with "Blaster" in its card name during your turn, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Ah, the perfect spell to close the curtains.

effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If your soul has two or more grade 2 cards with "Blaster" in their different card names , this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This dragon determines the true shine of a hero's soul.

effectEN:
[CONT](VC/RC):During the battle this unit attacked, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Knight of Ardent Light, Youth", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], look at the top three cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "Youthberk" in its card name from among them and reveal it and put it into your hand, or choose up to one grade 2 or less unit card from among them and call it to (RC), and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: I need to become stronger so that I can create a peaceful world!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your ride phase, you may call this card to (RC).

flavorTextEN: A holy tune echoes from the great heavens.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, COST  [retire this unit], choose a [Critical] trigger or [Front] trigger from your drop, and put it into your hand.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have a vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, this unit gets [Shield]+10000.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from your hand during your turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call this card to (RC) as [Rest].
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: If you value your life, take your chance to escape while it is still intimidating you.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Look at five cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one card with "RevolForm" in its card name from among them and reveal it and put it into your hand, or choose up to one grade 2 or less unit card from among them and call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your vanguard is placed by riding from a grade 3, COST  [Soul Blast (1) & retire this unit], Counter Charge (1), choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Remove the bad parts, and swiftly heal up the rest.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: Overcoming adversity, to grasp victory.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC) by any player's card's ability, if your hand has three or less cards, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: What remains is the will to counterattack.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The perfect opponent! I'll respond with all of my wind!

effectEN:
[CONT]:This card cannot be ridden, and cannot be normal called to (RC) from hand.
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and call this card to a back row (RC).
flavorTextEN: Skill is a given. Though finding the motivation can be difficult!

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have a vanguard with "Youthberk" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
[AUTO](RC):When your unit is placed on (VC) by the [RevolDress] ability, COST  [put this unit into soul], choose one of your vanguards, and increase or decrease its drive to 1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Power and will overlap. In such a way that it will not waver.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name, if that battle's drive check did not reveal a grade 3 card, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & retire this unit],  choose one of your rear-guards, and [Stand] it.
flavorTextEN: There's no way that I'd fail at such a crucial moment!

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "RevolForm" in its card name from among them and reveal it and put it into your hand, or choose up to one grade 2 or less card from among them and call it to (RC). Shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: The determination to destroy the skies grows larger, as more like minded allies gather around the black knight.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top three cards of your deck, and put them on the top of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: I've got the flow started! Now let's teach them a lesson!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your ride phase, you may call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: We can't leave it to the people from the skies to maintain order on the ground.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, COST  [retire this unit], choose a [Critical] trigger or [Front] trigger from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: A spin, glitter and some fluffiness. A great transformation of me!

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have a vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, this unit gets [Shield]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Evil beings that squirm in the darkness. They shall be banished with blessings from the crescent moon.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your soul has a grade 3 card, COST  [put a grade 3 card from your hand into your soul], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: In the glory of the highest sky, not a single stain is allowed.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, you may Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: It's super effective. You'll need a little courage to drink it though.

effectEN: [AUTO]When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, if your vanguard is [Glitter], COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Hope is always within grasp.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, if you have a vanguard with "Minerva" in its card name, return this unit to your hand.
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have grade 3 or greater "Regalia" in its card name in your soul, during that battle, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Note the documents. The primordial wisdom has saved us from predicaments countless times.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this card is rode upon by a unit with only <Genesis> for its clan, look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to two cards from among them, put it into your soul, and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO]:When this card is put into your drop zone from your soul, if you have a vanguard with "Minerva" in its card name, call this card to your back row (RC). If you called, you may Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: The magic of the soul of languages that rocks the heart across generations.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have a vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name, choose any number of your grade 3 or greater rear-guards, move them to (GC), and all of the moved units get [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: I'll protect it! My pride as a knight!

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 2 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.
